# Topic
- This project is for a lecture called Machine learning and Data mining
- This project focusing on techniques used to preprocess data, model structures and optimizing models accuracy
- This project is also heavily focused on reporting and documenting the experiment done

# Instructions
- Try to keep your code clean and well documented
- Update the README.md file regularly with relevant information about your project
- Do not use any emojis in the documentations, reports or code files.
- If changes are needed, apply them directly to the codebase and do not create separate files for changes
- Ensure that all code is properly tested and validated before submission
- Run everything on a conda environment called 'course'
- Do not make redundant files or folders, keep the repository clean and organized
- Remember to remove logging and debugging code after you finish testing
